posts.title: Getting Started with React
posts.body: React is a popular JavaScript library for building user interfaces. It allows developers to create reusable UI components and manage application state efficiently.

comments.body: Great introduction! Very helpful for beginners.
I wish you could cover hooks in more detail.

posts.title: Understanding TypeScript
posts.body: TypeScript is a typed superset of JavaScript that compiles to plain JavaScript. It adds optional static typing and class-based object-oriented programming to the language.

comments.body: TypeScript has really improved my code quality!

posts.title: Next.js for Server-Side Rendering
posts.body: Next.js is a React framework that enables server-side rendering and static site generation. It simplifies routing, data fetching, and deployment.
